title: Antique Atlas Tweaks
description: A mod that provides item-oriented tweaks to Antique Atlas 4
body:
This mod modifies Antique Atlas to be more item-bound, removing the original method of renaming a book and changing it into a dedicated item that you can craft. This is intended to integrate it more into survival.

This mod:
- Removes the original method of obtaining the Atlas (renaming a book "Antique Atlas")
- Adds a new item that acts as the Antique Atlas
- Adds a crafting recipe for the Antique Atlas
- Prevents the World Map from being opened without having an Antique Atlas in your inventory

![The crafting recipe for the Antique Atlas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ljpY4NNp/images/5edd3cddca2bfd1765084dfbbaad479e682a8827.png)
